name: Relative Line Numbers

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* feat: toggle on/off by @zxt-tzx in https://github.com/nadavspi/obsidian-relative-line-numbers/pull/23
* Add action to release plugin by @nadavspi in https://github.com/nadavspi/obsidian-relative-line-numbers/pull/24

## New Contributors
* @zxt-tzx made their first contribution in https://github.com/nadavspi/obsidian-relative-line-numbers/pull/23

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nadavspi/obsidian-relative-line-numbers/compare/3.0.0...3.1.0

releases.author: nadavspi
releases.description:
I'm tagging this as a major release because it enables the plugin on mobile devices and thus, a rollback could be considered a breaking change.

## What's Changed
* Changed Desktop Only to false by @Signynt in https://github.com/nadavspi/obsidian-relative-line-numbers/pull/9
* Remove dependency and fix folding behavior by @brush701 in https://github.com/nadavspi/obsidian-relative-line-numbers/pull/15
* Fix varying line number widths by @thwllms in https://github.com/nadavspi/obsidian-relative-line-numbers/pull/16
* Release/3.0.0 by @nadavspi in https://github.com/nadavspi/obsidian-relative-line-numbers/pull/22

## New Contributors
* @Signynt made their first contribution in https://github.com/nadavspi/obsidian-relative-line-numbers/pull/9
* @brush701 made their first contribution in https://github.com/nadavspi/obsidian-relative-line-numbers/pull/15
* @thwllms made their first contribution in https://github.com/nadavspi/obsidian-relative-line-numbers/pull/16

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nadavspi/obsidian-relative-line-numbers/compare/2.0.1...3.0.0

releases.author: nadavspi
releases.description:
Plugin now supports Live Preview as well as Legacy editors. 

There's currently a bug where disabling "Show line number" doesn't do anything while relative line numbers are enabled.
However, disabling the plugin still works. Should have a fix soon.

releases.author: nadavspi
releases.description: Restore to the default Code Mirror line formatted instead of storing on load

releases.author: nadavspi
releases.description: Restore line numbers when the plugin is disabled
